## Problem
What problem does this solve? What workflow is blocked or slow?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the tool/feature you'd like.

### MCP Tool Interface (if applicable)
```json
{
  "tool_name": {
    "param1": "description",
    "param2": "description"
  }
}
```

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you've tried or thought about.

## Use Case
Which site/app/workflow would benefit from this?
